properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "# SpyCloud Identity Exposure Dashboard
**Identity-Level Exposure Tracking** - Monitor identity-specific exposures, PII compromise, and identity risk scoring from SpyCloud Identity Exposure data.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL data for tracking identity-level breach exposure across your organization.

---"}, "name": "title"}, {"type": 9, "content": {"version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "parameters": [{"id": "ide_time_range", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TimeRange", "type": 4, "isRequired": true, "value": {"durationMs": 2592000000}, "typeSettings": {"selectableValues": [{"durationMs": 86400000}, {"durationMs": 604800000}, {"durationMs": 2592000000}, {"durationMs": 7776000000}], "allowCustom": true}, "label": "Time Range"}, {"id": "ide_sev_filter", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "SeverityFilter", "type": 2, "isRequired": false, "multiSelect": true, "quote": "", "delimiter": ",", "query": "SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc", "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": ["value::all"]}, "defaultValue": "value::all", "label": "Severity"}]}, "name": "parameters"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Total Identity Exposures", 0, 1, "Unique Identities", 0, 2, "Critical Exposures", 0, 3, "PII Records", 0, 4]),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Total Identity Exposures", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Unique Identities", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Critical Exposures", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(full_name) or isnotempty(phone) or isnotempty(national_id) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="PII Records", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc", "size": 4, "title": "Identity Exposure Summary", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"titleContent": {"columnMatch": "Label", "formatter": 1}, "leftContent": {"columnMatch": "Value", "formatter": 12, "formatOptions": {"palette": "auto"}}}}, "name": "identityExposureTiles"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), SeverityLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc)", "size": 0, "title": "Identity Exposure Trend by Severity (Daily)", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "areachart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "Critical", "color": "redBright"}, {"seriesName": "High", "color": "orange"}, {"seriesName": "Medium", "color": "yellow"}, {"seriesName": "Low", "color": "blue"}]}}, "name": "identityExposureTrend"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), HasPII=countif(isnotempty(full_name) or isnotempty(phone) or isnotempty(national_id)), DistinctSources=dcount(source_id), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| top 25 by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| project Identity=email, RiskLevel, Exposures, PIIRecords=HasPII, DistinctSources, LatestExposure)", "size": 0, "title": "Top 25 Exposed Identities", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"sortBy": [{"itemKey": "Exposures", "sortOrder": 2}]}}, "name": "topExposedIdentities"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(PIIType:string, Count:long)[]),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcountif(email, isnotempty(email)) | extend PIIType="Emails", Count=v),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=countif(isnotempty(phone)) | extend PIIType="Phones", Count=v),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=countif(isnotempty(national_id)) | extend PIIType="National IDs", Count=v),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=countif(isnotempty(dob)) | extend PIIType="Dates of Birth", Count=v),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=countif(isnotempty(full_name)) | extend PIIType="Full Names", Count=v),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=countif(isnotempty(address_1)) | extend PIIType="Addresses", Count=v)
| project PIIType, Count", "size": 1, "title": "PII Types Exposed", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "barchart"}, "name": "piiTypesExposed"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize Exposures=count(), UniqueIdentities=dcount(email), CriticalCount=countif(severity == 25) by tostring(email_domain)
| order by Exposures desc
| take 15)", "size": 1, "title": "Identity Exposures by Domain", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "barchart"}, "name": "exposuresByDomain"}], "templateMetadata": {"version": "1.0", "connectorAssociation": [{"connectorId": "SpyCloudIdentityExposure", "dataTypes": ["SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL"]}]}}
